name: PhD Candidate
history: PhD candidate engaged in scientific research, working on a sequencing-related study with a colleague named Kelly, and collaborating with a senior scientist who has struggled to gain recognition.
intermediate_belief: If I don't make significant progress, I will not succeed in my career.
intermediate_belief_depression: My work is not good enough, and I will never be recognized.
coping_strategies: Overworking and seeking validation from colleagues.
situation: Working on a PhD project and concerned about its progress.
auto_thought: I am not making enough progress, and I might fail.
behavior: Spending excessive hours on research and avoiding social interactions.
